016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena;
018
019/**
020 * Constants used by the {@link RdfSerializer} and {@link RdfParser} classes.
021 *
022 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
023 *    <li class='link'>{doc jmr.RdfDetails}
024
025 * </ul>
026 */
027@SuppressWarnings({
028   "java:S115" // RDF language name constants mirror the official Jena API string identifiers (e.g. LANG_RDF_XML, LANG_N3) which use mixed conventions
029})
030public class Constants {
031
032   private Constants() {}
033
034   /** Jena language support: <js>"RDF/XML"</js>.*/
035   public static final String LANG_RDF_XML = "RDF/XML";
036
037   /** Jena language support: <js>"RDF/XML-ABBREV"</js>.*/
038   public static final String LANG_RDF_XML_ABBREV = "RDF/XML-ABBREV";
039
040   /** Jena language support: <js>"N-TRIPLE"</js>.*/
041   public static final String LANG_NTRIPLE = "N-TRIPLE";
042
043   /** Jena language support: <js>"TURTLE"</js>.*/
044   public static final String LANG_TURTLE = "TURTLE";
045
046   /** Jena language support: <js>"N3"</js>.*/
047   public static final String LANG_N3 = "N3";
048
049   /** Jena language support: <js>"JSON-LD"</js>.*/
050   public static final String LANG_JSONLD = "JSON-LD";
051
052   /** Jena language support: <js>"N-QUADS"</js>.*/
053   public static final String LANG_NQUADS = "N-QUADS";
054
055   /** Jena language support: <js>"TRIG"</js>.*/
056   public static final String LANG_TRIG = "TRIG";
057
058   /** Jena language support: <js>"TRIX"</js>.*/
059   public static final String LANG_TRIX = "TRIX";
060
061   /** Jena language support: <js>"RDF/JSON"</js>.*/
062   public static final String LANG_RDFJSON = "RDF/JSON";
063
064   /** Jena language support: <js>"RDF/THRIFT"</js> (binary).*/
065   public static final String LANG_RDFTHRIFT = "RDF/THRIFT";
066
067   /** Jena language support: <js>"RDF/PROTO"</js> (binary).*/
068   public static final String LANG_RDFPROTO = "RDF/PROTO";
069
070   /**
071    * RDF property identifier <js>"items"</js>.
072    *
073    * <p>
074    * For resources that are collections, this property identifies the RDF Sequence container for the items in the
075    * collection.
076    */
077   public static final String RDF_juneauNs_ITEMS = "items";
078
079   /**
080    * RDF property identifier <js>"root"</js>.
081    *
082    * <p>
083    * Property added to root nodes to help identify them as root elements during parsing.
084    *
085    * <p>
086    * Added if {@link RdfSerializer.Builder#addRootProperty()} setting is enabled.
087    */
088   public static final String RDF_juneauNs_ROOT = "root";
089
090   /**
091    * RDF property identifier <js>"class"</js>.
092    *
093    * <p>
094    * Property added to bean resources to identify the class type.
095    *
096    * <p>
097    * Added if {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.Serializer.Builder#addBeanTypes()} setting is enabled.
098    */
099   public static final String RDF_juneauNs_TYPE = "_type";
100
101   /**
102    * RDF property identifier <js>"value"</js>.
103    *
104    * <p>
105    * Property added to nodes to identify a simple value.
106    */
107   public static final String RDF_juneauNs_VALUE = "value";
108
109   /**
110    * RDF resource that identifies a <jk>null</jk> value.
111    */
112   public static final String RDF_NIL = "http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#nil";
113
114   /**
115    * RDF resource that identifies a <c>Seq</c> value.
116    */
117   public static final String RDF_SEQ = "http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#Seq";
118
119   /**
120    * RDF resource that identifies a <c>Bag</c> value.
121    */
122   public static final String RDF_BAG = "http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#Bag";
123}
